questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of a request-reply protocol in the context of remote invocation. (6 marks)
Explain the difference between a Remote Procedure Call (RPC) and Remote Method Invocation (RMI). Provide an example to illustrate your answer. (8 marks)
What is the primary advantage of using a request-reply protocol in a distributed system, and how does it impact the performance of the system? (5 marks)
